
$$
\left[ \pi  \eqdef\Prf{Y=1|\vX = \vx}\right]
\underbrace{
\overbrace{
\underset{
\xleftarrow[ \frac{\odds}{1+\odds}]{}
}
{
\xrightarrow{\frac{\pi}{1-\pi}}
}
\left[\odds \eqdef \oddsf{Y=1|\vX = \vx}\right]
\underset{
\xleftarrow[\exp{\logodds}]{}
}
{
\xrightarrow{\logf{\odds}}
}
}^{\logit(\pi)}
}_{\expit(\logodds)}
\left[\logodds(\vx) \eqdef \logoddsf{Y=1|\vX = \vx}\right]
$$
